strengths: 15+ years of diverse software engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains, meeting the minimum experience threshold.
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) frameworks at re:cinq demonstrates emerging practical AI tooling exposure.
Entrepreneurial track record with GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform) and multiple startup roles illustrates an independent builder mentality.
concerns: No advanced degree in AI or a related technical field; dual undergraduate background (Computer Science and Fine Arts) does not align with the preferred Master's/PhD profile.
AI depth is shallow and recent — meaningful AI infrastructure work is limited to a 6-month stint; no demonstrated large-scale AI products or platforms with measurable impact.

No evidence of director-level influence, executive advisory, or strategic customer engagement; career trajectory is that of a senior/staff IC, not a principal-level thought leader advising organizations on AI adoption.
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a well-rounded, technically broad software engineer with over 15 years of experience and genuine entrepreneurial instincts, but he falls significantly short of the profile this role demands. The position requires demonstrated AI leadership — architected platforms, recognized expertise, and the ability to advise strategic customers at an executive level — none of which appear in his history. His AI exposure is limited to a brief, recent role, and his career arc does not evidence the director-level individual contributor scope, external thought leadership, or cloud-platform strategy experience central to this position.
